title: Huawei S110-16LP2SR Gigabit PoE switch, 2x SFP
description: Huawei S110-16LP2SR is a PoE switch with support for active power supply 802.3af/at with a PoE budget of 124W , which is equipped with 16 PoE ports and 2 SFP slots for uplink . Switch without management is in a metal rackmount chassis, it is possible to mount it on the wall or use as desktop. A pair of switches is located on the front. The first one allows you to choose between Standard, Port Isolation, Uplink aggregation and Flow control disabling modes. The second switch is used to switch the… Huawei eKitEngine S110 series switches ( S110 for short) are unmanaged switches designed for the distribution market outside China. The whole series adopts an all-new crystal-like appearance design with great visual impacts, winning itself the German Red Dot Design Award 2022 . The newly launched colorways of Silk White and Silver Frost are becoming increasingly popular. In addition, the iconic Huawei logo on eKitEngine S110 series switches gives them a more refreshing look. In terms of… Device 230V AC Power Cable Rack mounts (6) Screws (4) Self-Adhesive Rubber Pads
